description: Tool execution contracts — platform invocation, model resolution, tool catalog discovery, tool executor, and idempotency key resolution.

files.responsibility: LLM platform adapter — invoke a model with input/options, return raw response array.
Resolves which model to use — given default model, message bag, context, and options.
Provides available tool definitions for a given context — the tool catalog.
Executes a single tool call, returns a ToolResult.
Optional stronger idempotency key contract — resolves a deterministic idempotency key from a ToolCall for result deduplication.
